---
title: "B | Regeln Spielerisch"
format: live-html
engine: knitr
week: 8
topic: "Rechenregeln für SEM"
status: "Version 0.1"
comment: "Spiel zum Erlernen der Regeln"
lang: de
webr:
  packages: [htmltools]
  quiet: true
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

<iframe id="mathe-game" src="static/mathe_game.html"
        style="width:100%; height:65vh; border:1px solid #333; border-radius:12px;"
        allow="fullscreen">
</iframe>

<script>
// Sync Quarto theme toggle with iframe
(function() {
  function sendTheme() {
    var theme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme') || 'light';
    var iframe = document.getElementById('mathe-game');
    if (iframe && iframe.contentWindow) {
      iframe.contentWindow.postMessage({ theme: theme }, '*');
    }
  }
  // Send on load
  window.addEventListener('load', function() { setTimeout(sendTheme, 500); });
  // Watch for Quarto theme changes (MutationObserver on <html> data-bs-theme)
  var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(m) {
      if (m.attributeName === 'data-bs-theme') sendTheme();
    });
  });
  observer.observe(document.documentElement, { attributes: true });
})();
</script>

Für Nebenrechungen in R:

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true


```



Notation nach:

* Steyer, R., & Eid, M. (2001). Messen und Testen (2., korrigierte Aufl). Springer.
